   contain the root `toctree` directive.

News Application Documentation
==============================

Welcome to the News Application capstone project.

Overview
--------

This is a Django-based news platform featuring:

- Role-based authentication (Reader, Journalist, Editor)
- Article creation, editing, approval workflow
- Publisher and journalist subscriptions
- Newsletter system
- REST API support

Project Modules
---------------

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2

   modules
